steps.title: Find the slope
steps.content:
Use the two given points, $(0,2)$ and $(8,34)$.
$$m=\frac{34-2}{8-0}=\frac{32}{8}=4$$

steps.title: Use the intercept
steps.content:
The point $(0,2)$ shows the $y$-intercept is $2$, so the function has slope $4$ and intercept $2$.
$$f(x)=4x+2$$
The answer is C.
